scopeReview.command: Read automation memory, AGENT.md, docs/agent-feedback.md, docs/user/design-harness-workflow.md, docs/agent-rules.json, docs/project-context.json, role prompts, package scripts, and recent commits.
scopeReview.summary: Recent candidate failures were product/UI implementation details or test stabilization work, not reusable Agent-process failures. No AGENT.md or harness policy edit qualified.

harnessValidate.summary: Harness structure, project rules, documentation line limits, and purity checks passed for this state-only update.

verifyAlias.summary: Full policy profile passed after temporarily isolating unrelated pre-existing src worktree changes from this automation scope.

issuesObserved: Recent completed work included product/UI styling, icon, theme, and test-stability changes.
No recent evidence showed a reusable Agent planning, scope, verification, review, documentation, or synchronization failure that should become durable harness policy.
retrospective.reason: Candidate issues were project-local or implementation-specific. The only required action was project-context synchronization for the automation run.
